basic_details.job_title: CSIR IHBT Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT)
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (CSIR IHBT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 4 Project Associate PAT-I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 30-07-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Bioinformatics, MCA, M.Sc. in Data Science/ AI
qualification.details: Project Associate PAT-I (2 Posts): M.Sc. in Bioinformatics from a recognized university or MCA from a recognized university or equivalent. Desirable: Proven working experience in Linux/ NGS/ Deep-Learning. For MCA candidates, at least one research publication in the area of AI/DL. Project Associate PAT-I (2 Posts): M.Sc. in Bioinformatics from a recognized university or M.Sc. in Data Science/ AI from a recognized university. Desirable: Experience in working with NGS data and Linux OS.

salary_details.details: Project Associate PAT-I: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Per Month

selection_process: Scrutiny by Screening Committee Online Interview via Video Conferencing / MS Team
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR IHBT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate PAT-I (2 Posts): M.Sc. in Bioinformatics from a recognized university or MCA from a recognized university or equivalent. Desirable: Proven working experience in Linux/ NGS/ Deep-Learning. For MCA candidates, at least one research publication in the area of AI/DL. Project Associate PAT-I (2 Posts): M.Sc. in Bioinformatics from a recognized university or M.Sc. in Data Science/ AI from a recognized university. Desirable: Experience in working with NGS data and Linux OS.

content_sections.text: Scrutiny by Screening Committee Online Interview via Video Conferencing / MS Team

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Sc. in Bioinformatics, MCA, or an M.Sc. in Data Science/AI from a recognized university. Specific desirable qualifications are also mentioned for each post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate PAT-I positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Associate PAT-I posts is 35 years as of 30th July 2026. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate PAT-I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Associate PAT-I position announced by CSIR IHBT.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate PAT-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CSIR IHBT Project Associate PAT-I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny by a Screening Committee followed by an online interview conducted via Video Conferencing or MS Teams.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR IHBT located?
faq.answer: CSIR IHBT is located in Palampur, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 176061.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any desirable qualifications for the Project Associate PAT-I posts?
faq.answer: Yes, for some posts, desirable qualifications include experience in Linux, NGS, Deep-Learning, or research publications in AI/DL for MCA candidates.
